title: Saphy Pack
description: The pack that is used on Saphy SMP. It contains custom: Models, Items Textures, Paintings, & Banner Patterns
body:
# The Saphy Pack!
**This is a Data Pack and a Resource Pack!!! Please make sure to put them in both folders!**

Here it is! The one and only Saphy Pack used on Saphy SMP. It holds all of our custom items and such! I will be posting them here from now on.

Toss certain items into a stonecutter and get cool custom models or textures! Also, explore advancements based on members of the SMP!

**For the sake of survival compatibility, anything with durability will be damaged to around 10% when used in the stonecutter! I'd recommend using Percy's Sewing Kit to get around this, but it isn't mandatory.**


### Custom Painting List
These don't need any fiddling and can be placed with the painting item in survival.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

* Eyes by SuperGaming
* Mesa by SuperGaming
* Lighthouse by SuperGaming
* Santana Flag by SuperGaming
* Axolotl by SuperGaming
* Trash by SuperGaming
* Shofy Bebop by Paralysis
* Skies by SuperGaming
* Borscht by Jallo
* Cherry by Jallo
* Lime by Jallo
* Not by Jallo
* Picasso by Jallo
* Weave by Swufs
* Joshua by SuperGaming
* Monument by SuperGaming


</details>


### Custom Advancement List
These can be found in the Saphy tab of the Advancements menu. (Warning: Advancements are still in beta and can be subject to change!)

**Advancement:** Description (How to get it)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

* "King of Death" (Die 100 times)
* "Fishing Master" (Fish up all possible fishing items)
* "Iron Maiden" (Get a stack of Iron Blocks)
* "Music Man" (Collect all music discs)
* "I <3 Trails" (Make a path block, then break a diamond shovel)
* "Jar of Dirt" (Fill your inventory with dirt)
* "I'm Rich" (Get a stack of Diamond Blocks)
* "Champion of the Village" (Win a raid without armor)
* "Bamboozled" (Breed a baby brown panda)
* "Birds of a Feather" (Tame all bird types)
* "Fire King" (Get an enchanted flint and steel)
* "Observative" (Place 9 stacks of observers)
* "Razor Feather" (Use an elytra for 300km)
* "Sheppard of Snowpity" (Break 4 stacks of lecterns)
* "Trimmed and Ready" (Collect all trims)
* "Trot Along" (Ride a horse for 100km)
* "Use Spearingly" (Deal a final blow to a warden with a spear)

</details>



## For Legacy Versions (Pre-2.0)
Use the `/trigger CMD` command. Use `/trigger CMD 0` to reset. Remember to have the correct item in hand!
Example: `/trigger CMD 1` changes to Pizza Box.

## Credits

* SuperGaming, but on... [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@SuperGamingYT_), [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/supergamingyt.bsky.social), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/SuperGamingYT_) - Project Maintainer, Models, Items, Paintings, Equipment, Plush Maker, & Banner Patterns
* Shof, but on... [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@_Shof_) - Paintings, Models & Items
* Paralysis, but on... [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/__.paralysis.__/?igsh=N3Nka3ZmN2hnNHJ3) - Paintings

* Saignus, but on... [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCmJQE_PDIp8gPiTJfq5AqKQ) - Equipment
* Jallo, but on... [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpap8zrCHynKRBNabVwX0Ig) - Paintings
